name: collection_page_5_collections_all

observed_strengths.observation: H1 is 'all items' (text exists) — the page has at least one heading, preventing a complete H1 absence

missing_or_weak.observation: Meta description is 'all items' — the most degenerate collection meta of all 5 stores tested. The meta_description field contains only the collection title. Organic searches for 'sustainable clothing', 'organic cotton clothes', or 'eco fashion' get a snippet that reads 'all items' — zero keyword value, zero brand signal

H1 is lowercase 'all items' — the H1 matches the degenerate meta description; the all-products collection is missing a keyword-rich, properly capitalised heading like 'Sustainable Clothing — Hemp, Organic Cotton & Recycled Materials'
OG title and OG description are empty — social shares from the all-products collection page produce blank preview cards

purchase_path_notes: The all-products collection is the most under-optimized page in the crawl set — meta_description 'all items' is placeholder text that was never replaced. This page should rank for broad 'sustainable clothing' queries but has no SEO signal.
